case_title: ALLSTATE INSURANCE CO., vs. V.C. FOODS, INC., et al

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ALLSTATE INSURANCE CO. SERVED JAN-12-1994, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT V.C. FOODS, INC.

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF JUN-14-1994, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT STATUS CONFERENCE ON JUN-14-1994, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4) HEARING SET FOR JUL-14-1994 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ALLSTATE INSURANCE CO. AS TO DEFENDANT V.C. FOODS, INC. MEDINA, HAROLD CHRISTOPHER DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          APR-15-1994 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  FEB-14-1994 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       MAR-28-1994
STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF APR-15-1994, CONTINUED TO JUN-14-1994 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT BY 6/14/94. NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF JUL-14-1994, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $100.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON JUL-14-1994, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), TO SHOW CAUSE WHY CASE SHOULD NOT BE DISMISSED PER CRC 525., PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE AUG-15-1994 CONTINUED FROM JUL-14-1994 TO AUG-15-1994 AT 02:00 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT
OSC CALENDAR OF AUG-15-1994, DISMISSAL DISMISSED W/OUT PREJUDICE PER CRC 525.
